name: Scattergun
description: The Scattergun is a Jakobs shotgun built for aggressive close-quarters play, delivering heavy per-shot damage as fast as you can pull the trigger. Its accuracy is only fair, and many rolls carry just one or two shells, so it trades comfort for raw burst. Versions with a Tediore barrel lose pellet count and fall noticeably behind the stronger Jakobs variants.
notes: Random world drop from any suitable loot source.
